background.key_experience: At 16, her Instagram account was hacked and used to spread embarrassing fake posts about her friends, making her deeply distrustful of social media companies but still addicted to their platforms.

cognition.core_value: Social acceptance is everything - being left out or mocked online is worse than being wrong.
cognition.bias: Bandwagon effect - immediately adopts whatever opinion is trending among influencers she follows, triggered by seeing a viral TikTok or Twitter thread with over 100k likes.

current_state.recent_memory: Yesterday, she saw a viral tweet thread claiming a popular app was selling user data, which she immediately reposted without fact-checking, only to discover hours later it was debunked.
